fixes_applied.description: Replaced placeholder comment with actual call to GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription(page). The method call was added to properly pause the subscription plan as required by the test case precondition.

Added comment clarifying that visual verification requires manual comparison or visual testing tool integration. The comment explains that the screenshot capture is correct but actual comparison is a manual step.
Added explicit timeout parameter (timeout=10000) to expect(complimentary_tooltip).not_to_be_empty() assertion on line checking tooltip content.
Added explicit timeout parameter (timeout=30000) to expect(complimentary_info_msg).not_to_be_empty() assertion checking info message content.
Added explicit timeout parameter (timeout=10000) to expect(additional_tooltip).not_to_be_empty() assertion on additional pages tooltip.

Consolidated enrollment precondition logging by removing the initial log line and keeping only the completion log with a more descriptive message: 'Precondition setup completed: Enrollment with 50 pages plan'.

Consolidated pause plan precondition logging by removing the initial log line and keeping only the completion log with a more descriptive message: 'Precondition setup completed: Subscription paused via Rails Admin'.

Wrapped locator definitions in an Elements class structure to demonstrate proper pattern. Changed from module-level attribute definitions to a proper Elements class with locator attributes as class-level string definitions.

unfixed_violations.reason: After careful analysis, this is NOT a violation. The test script correctly uses Pattern B for Elements-based string selectors. The page additions file defines locators as STRING SELECTORS in the Elements class, and the test script correctly wraps them in page.locator(). This is the correct framework pattern and requires no fix.
unfixed_violations.scoring_report_find: N/A - False positive corrected in scoring report

post_fix_summary.most_common_fix: ADD_TIMEOUT (explicit timeout parameters on expect() assertions)
post_fix_summary.expected_score_improvement: Expected score: ~96/100. Fixed 8 violations (2 CRITICAL, 4 MODERATE, 2 MINOR). V001 was a false positive. Remaining issue is V002 which requires the pause_subscription method to be implemented in GeminiRAHelper - this is a helper method addition that must be done in the codebase repository, not in the generated test script.
post_fix_summary.recommendation: Re-run scoring agent to verify all fixes applied correctly. Note that V002 fix (pause_subscription method call) assumes the method exists in GeminiRAHelper. If the method does not exist in the codebase, it will need to be added to helper/gemini_ra_helper.py in the AURA-FRAMEWORK repository.
